summary: Admin User Management & Subscription Management feature testing complete. All 33 backend API tests PASSED (100%). All frontend UI components verified working correctly via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/users returns list with name, email, plan, school_count, status, created_at
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/users supports search parameter filtering by name or email
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/users supports plan filter parameter (basic/pro/premium)
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/users/{userId} returns full user detail with stats, programs, interactions
VERIFIED: PUT /api/admin/users/{userId} updates plan and creates audit log entry
VERIFIED: POST /api/admin/users creates a new user with athlete record
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/subscriptions returns stats (MRR, plan_counts, total_users) and user list
VERIFIED: PUT /api/admin/subscriptions/{userId} changes plan and creates audit log
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/subscription-logs returns audit trail entries
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/subscription-tiers returns tier definitions (basic=$0/5 schools, pro=$29/25 schools/10 AI, premium=$49/unlimited)
VERIFIED: All admin endpoints reject non-admin users (athlete gets 403)
VERIFIED: Admin Users page renders user table with search and plan filter
VERIFIED: Clicking a user row navigates to /admin/users/{userId} detail page
VERIFIED: User detail page shows stats, manage account section, plan features
VERIFIED: Saving plan change on detail page shows toast and updates successfully
VERIFIED: Admin Subscriptions page shows revenue stats ($29 MRR), plan distribution, user table with inline changer
VERIFIED: Sidebar shows Users and Subscriptions nav items for admin role
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test user (TEST_User_*) during backend testing for create user endpoint validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin User Management & Subscription Management fully implemented and tested. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_admin_user_management.py covers all 11 endpoints. Admin guard uses require_admin dependency checking for platform_admin or director roles. Subscription tiers defined in /app/backend/subscriptions.py. Sarah Martinez has Pro plan and shows in audit log. Emma Chen has 12 schools and 57 interactions. The admin_user_management.py router handles user CRUD, subscription changes with audit logging, and tier definitions.
